description: The data architecture governing how records are held and linked in an IDS project.

namedIndividuals.description: Raw data from multiple partners is centralized at a single site for linkage and analysis.
namedIndividuals.name: Custodial

namedIndividuals.description: Data remains with custodians and is linked via PET-enabled protocols without centralization.
namedIndividuals.name: Federated

title: Architecture

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.
@id.title: IRI
